name: higgsfield
description: Image/video generation, branded Marketing Studio, video engagement analysis, and Soul Character training via Higgsfield AI.

interface.shortDescription: Train Soul Characters and generate powerful AI visuals
interface.longDescription: Higgsfield AI Skills turn Codex into a creative production agent. Train reusable Soul Characters from real photos, generate high-quality images and videos across Higgsfield models, create polished product photoshoots, build marketplace-ready product cards, produce branded ad assets through Marketing Studio, and score finished videos with Brain Activity engagement analysis. The plugin uses the Higgsfield CLI for authenticated workflows and returns ready-to-use result URLs or text analysis reports.
defaultPrompt: Train a Soul Character from these photos
Generate a cinematic product image with Higgsfield
Analyze this ad video for engagement and hook strength
Create marketplace-ready product cards for this item
